BlobTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs when a blob is added or updated in an Azure Storage container.
CosmosDBTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs when a document changes in an Azure Cosmos DB container.
DurableFunctionsEntity_description: A Durable Functions entity in Node.js that manages durable state via the v4 programming model.
DurableFunctionsOrchestrator_description: A Durable Functions orchestrator in Node.js that coordinates activity invocations via the v4 programming model.
EventGridTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs in response to an Event Grid event.
EventHubTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs when an event is received from an Azure Event Hub.
HttpTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs in response to HTTP requests.
QueueTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs when a message is added to an Azure Storage queue.
ServiceBusQueueTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs when a message is added to a Service Bus queue.
ServiceBusTopicTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs when a message is added to a Service Bus topic subscription.
TimerTrigger_description: An Azure Function that runs on a schedule defined by a CRON expression.
DaprPublishOutputBinding_description: An Azure Function that publishes messages to a Dapr topic via an output binding.
DaprServiceInvocationTrigger_description: An Azure Function that handles Dapr service invocation requests.
DaprTopicTrigger_description: An Azure Function that handles messages from a Dapr pub/sub topic.
McpToolTrigger_description: An Azure Function that exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool endpoint.
McpResourceTrigger_description: An Azure Function that exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) resource endpoint.
McpPromptTrigger_description: An Azure Function that exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) prompt endpoint.
trigger_functionName_help: The name of the function. Must start with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters or underscores.
trigger_functionName_errorText: Function names must start with a letter, end with a letter or number, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores (max 128 chars).
timerTrigger_schedule_help: A CRON expression that defines when the timer fires (e.g. '0 */5 * * * *' for every five minutes).
queueTrigger_name_help: The name of the Azure Storage queue the function listens to.
queueTrigger_connection_help: The app setting that holds the storage account connection string.
blobTrigger_connection_help: The app setting that holds the storage account connection string.
cosmosTrigger_connection_help: The app setting that holds the Cosmos DB connection string.
cosmosTrigger_database_help: The Cosmos DB database to monitor.
cosmosTrigger_collection_help: The Cosmos DB container (collection) to monitor.
cosmosTrigger_createLease_label: Create lease collection if it does not exist
cosmosTrigger_createLease_help: When true, the Cosmos DB trigger creates the lease container automatically if it is missing.
eventHubTrigger_name_help: The name of the Event Hub to consume events from.
serviceBusTrigger_name_help: The name of the Service Bus queue the function listens to.
serviceBusTrigger_connection_help: The app setting that holds the Service Bus connection string.
serviceBusTrigger_topic_help: The Service Bus topic the function subscribes to.
serviceBusTrigger_subscription_help: The Service Bus topic subscription the function reads from.
